name: file_read
description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the user's local machine and return its contents. Reads are sandboxed to ~/.juno/skill-data/ unless the user has explicitly allowed more.
when_to_use: User asks you to look at, summarise, or quote from a specific file they've referenced.
when_not_to_use: User hasn't named a file. Don't speculatively scan disk. For bulk file search use the (future) `file_search` skill, not repeated reads.

path.description: Absolute path or path relative to the sandbox (~/.juno/skill-data).

max_bytes.description: Cap on bytes returned (default 200_000). Larger files come back truncated with a note.
